_schema.description: Maps a projectDetails entry ID to its carousel screenshots. The src is resolved relative to assets/images/{project|experience}/<id>/<src>. Drop the image file there, list it here. Any common image format works: png, jpg, jpeg, webp, gif, svg. Entries omitted from this manifest fall back to the placeholder.

proj-aws-rl-env.label: System Architecture — Docker, FastAPI server, MiniStack pool
Curriculum — 124 tasks across 5 difficulty tiers + Drift track
Parallel Rollout — 8 concurrent task pools (~8× wall-clock speedup)
Reward Shaping — achievement, dense shaping, penalties & hint decay
Live Environment — 8 parallel WebSocket clients on init
SFT Eval — Exact accuracy lifted from 38.9% to 88.9%
SFT Training Curves — loss, eval loss, LR schedule, gradient norm
GRPO Training Run — reward mean, KL divergence, completion length
Per-Tier Success — SFT vs SFT+GRPO across difficulty tiers

proj-leetcode-companion.label: Landing — paste a LeetCode URL to get started
Problem View — Analyze My Approach + Generate Solution
Approach Feedback — what you got right + where to reconsider
Progressive Hints — Gentle → Nudge → Near Solution
Code Solution + multi-agent SSE streams visible in DevTools
Complexity & Math Proofs — time/space + proof by exhaustion

exp0-4.label: Public API Developer Docs — endpoints, auth & response samples
AWS API Gateway — public resources routed to Lambda

exp0-5.label: User Overview — multi-filter admin dashboard with role, activity & engagement columns

exp1-1.label: AI Settings — Moderation, Search & Translation agents + grounding context

exp1-2.label: End Users SSO — SAML, OAuth2, OpenID, Google Sign-In configured

exp2-2.label: Languages Admin Panel — enable & publish per locale
